title: NotebookLM is now bigger than Gemini
summary: NotebookLM has achieved greater search interest than Google Gemini. Its primary advantage is grounding answers in user-provided documents across multiple formats to avoid hallucinations, making it suitable for accuracy-critical tasks with known sources.
